kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Riverside goes with Cedric or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Beatrix.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with 7 coins; Wulfric goes with Millpond; Carpenter goes with 13 coins.
Bridgegate goes with at least one of Beatrix, Wulfric, or 17 coins.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is lower than both Edmund and the Carpenter.
Between Wulfric and Oldwall, one goes with Blacksmith and the other with 9 coins.
Cooper goes with Millpond if and only if someone in the Hill Ward goes with Edmund.
More members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the River Ward than members of the Clothiers' Guild.
Edmund goes with exactly two of Mason, Oldwall, and 13 coins.
Potter, Millpond, and Oldwall go with Beatrix, Cedric, and Edmund, in some order.
Matilda goes with none of Highrow, 7 coins, or 15 coins.
At least one of (the members of the Clothiers' Guild, Matilda, and the artisan with 17 coins) belongs to the River Ward.
